vocab.sentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern life.

vocab.meaning: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically
vocab.sentence: She took a pragmatic approach to solving the crisis.

vocab.meaning: Lasting for a very short time
vocab.sentence: Fame can be ephemeral in the entertainment industry.

vocab.meaning: Showing great attention to detail; very careful
vocab.sentence: He kept meticulous records of every transaction.

vocab.meaning: Able to recover quickly from difficulties
vocab.sentence: The resilient economy bounced back after the recession.
She gave a candid account of the incident.

vocab.meaning: Having or showing care in one's work
vocab.sentence: A diligent student revises every day.

vocab.meaning: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
vocab.sentence: Her eloquent speech moved the audience.

vocab.meaning: Sparing or economical with money or food
vocab.sentence: Being frugal helped him save for his studies.
Change is inevitable in any growing organisation.
